ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the stock is listed on */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjustment_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor for the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the indicator belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI, MFI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "ma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moving average */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the moving average belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the moving average */,
  "window" INTEGER /* Window size of the moving average (e.g., 7 days, 14 days) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the moving average */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moving average was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moving average was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moving_averages_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rsi" (
  "rsi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSI value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the RSI value belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the RSI value */,
  "window" INTEGER /* Window size of the RSI (e.g., 7 days, 14 days) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the RSI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the RSI value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the RSI value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rsi_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mfi" (
  "mfi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MFI value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the MFI value belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the MFI value */,
  "window" INTEGER /* Window size of the MFI (e.g., 7 days, 14 days) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the MFI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MFI value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MFI value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mfi_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the model is trained on */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the predictive model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model that made the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actual_values" (
  "actual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the actual value is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the actual value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the actual value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actual value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actual value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_values_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model the metric is for */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the metric is for */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation metric (e.g., mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock ("stock_id")
)
